title: P2 micro：移除日卡列容器裁切造成的陰影切割線
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: User sees a hard horizontal line/cut right below the 7-day strip, like a gridline or a hidden box edge. Management root-caused it in frontend/src/index.css: .day-strip-card carries a downward soft shadow (box-shadow 0 12px 24px), but the wrapper .day-strip-scroll still has overflow-y: hidden with padding-bottom: 0 — a leftover from the horizontal-scroll-container era. The shadow is clipped flat at the container's bottom edge, producing the visible straight cutoff. On desktop the wrapper uses overflow-x: clip and the hidden serves no purpose.

in_scope: S1 desktop (default) .day-strip-scroll: stop clipping vertically so card shadows render fully (e.g. overflow: visible on desktop where overflow-x is clip; adjust as needed while keeping single-row layout intact)

S2 mobile (<700px) where overflow-x: auto is genuinely needed: keep the scroll container but give the shadow room (sufficient padding-bottom, optionally negative margin compensation) so no hard cutoff line appears there either
S3 verify no other section (72h chart shell, advice, sunrise cards) exhibits the same clipped-shadow line; fix identically if found
S4 tests/build: existing suites pass; no structural test changes expected beyond possible class tweaks
out_of_scope: Any visual redesign beyond removing the clip artifact

requirements: R1: Do not alter the approved 3622a0a card look (spacing/typography/shadow softness) — only stop the shadow from being cut
R2: No regression: 7-card single row at desktop, mobile horizontal scroll, click/keyboard switching
R3: English-only code comments; frontend-only card
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: Desktop: no horizontal cutoff line below the day strip; card shadows fade out naturally
AC3: Mobile: strip still scrolls horizontally with no hard shadow cutoff
AC4: Changes committed and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; clean up any verification servers afterward.
Frontend-only micro card; do not touch backend files.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Remove the leftover overflow clipping on the day-strip wrapper so card shadows are no longer cut into a hard line below the row; give mobile's real scroll container shadow room; nothing else changes.
next_task_hint: Remaining: deploy auth -> actual public-URL deploy, Gemini decision, submission polish. Deadline 2026-07-06 12:00.
